x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Asset linkage links work orders to equipment. Now Assist FSM uses asset history for AI troubleshooting recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Link work orders to asset records at creation. Maintain asset maintenance history in the asset record. Target: 70%+ of closed work orders linked to an asset. Now Assist FSM uses asset history for AI troubleshooting recommendations.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cb8
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Asset linkage links work orders to equipment. Now Assist FSM uses asset history for AI troubleshooting recommendations.]]></ai_justification><check_name>FSM Asset Linkage</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('wm_order');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed work orders in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed work orders found in the last 12 months. Asset linkage cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaWithAsset = new GlideAggregate('wm_order');
    gaWithAsset.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4');
    gaWithAsset.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaWithAsset.addQuery('asset', '!=', '');
    gaWithAsset.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaWithAsset.query();
    var withAsset = gaWithAsset.next() ? parseInt(gaWithAsset.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((withAsset / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed work orders have asset linked (last 12 months, ' + withAsset + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 70) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of work orders are linked to assets. Now Assist FSM can provide asset-informed AI troubleshooting recommendations based on maintenance history.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 40) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of work orders have an asset linked (target: 70%). Now Assist FSM asset-informed AI recommendations will have limited coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of work orders have an asset linked. Now Assist FSM cannot provide asset-specific AI troubleshooting without asset linkage.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>FIELD_SERVICE</module><number>CHK0000434</number><order>70</order><remediation_guidance>Link work orders to asset records at creation. Maintain asset maintenance history in the asset record. Target: 70%+ of closed work orders linked to an asset. Now Assist FSM uses asset history for AI troubleshooting recommendations.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>4bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cb8</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>FSM Asset Linkage</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_4bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cb8</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
